'''Paul Anderson''' (born 2 April 1977) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]], [[Sheffield Eagles]], [[Leigh Centurions]],<ref name="Statistics at leighrl.co.uk">{{cite web|url=https://leighrl.co.uk/wp/team_member/anderson-paul|title=Statistics at leighrl.co.uk|publisher=leighrl.co.uk|date=31 December 2017|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref><ref name="They Played For Leigh (Statistics) at leighrl.co.uk">{{cite web|url=https://leighrl.co.uk/wp/they-played-for-leigh|title=They Played For Leigh (Statistics) at leighrl.co.uk|publisher=leighrl.co.uk|date=31 December 2017|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref><ref name="Heritage Numbers at leighrl.co.uk">{{cite web|url=https://leighrl.co.uk/wp/club/heritage-numbers|title=Heritage Numbers at leighrl.co.uk|publisher=leighrl.co.uk|date=31 December 2017|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref> [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]] and [[Rochdale Hornets]], as a {{rlp|ce|sr}}, or {{rlp|lf}}.<ref name="Statistics at loverugbyleague.com"/>

==Playing career==
===St Helens===
Anderson began his playing career in 1995 with [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]], and played 46 games for the club. He made his Debut on Boxing Day 1995 in a game against Wigan Warriors at Central Park. Anderson wore #11 playing in the second row in a tough loss to their Super League rivals <ref>{{cite web|title=Paul Anderson|url=http://www.saints.org.uk/saints/player.php?num=14798|publisher=Saints Heritage Society|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref>

===Sheffield Eagles===
In January 1999, he was signed by [[Sheffield Eagles]] for a fee of £10,000.<ref>{{cite web|last1=Hadfield|first1=Dave|title=Rugby League: Rangers handed another big draw|url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/rugby-league-rangers-handed-another-big-draw-1045558.html |archive-url=https://ghostarchive.org/archive/20220525/https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/rugby-league-rangers-handed-another-big-draw-1045558.html |archive-date=25 May 2022 |url-access=subscription |url-status=live|website=The Independent|access-date=1 January 2018|date=7 January 1999}}</ref>

===Leigh===
Anderson joined [[Leigh Centurions]] later that year, where we went on make over 100 appearances,<ref>{{cite web|title=Anderson, Paul|url=https://leighrl.co.uk/wp/team_member/anderson-paul-2|website=Leigh Centurions|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref> and also played for [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]]<ref>{{cite web|title=Player Statistics|url=http://www.orl-heritagetrust.org.uk/stats|publisher=Oldham Rugby League Heritage Trust|access-date=1 January 2018}}</ref> and [[Rochdale Hornets]].
